ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year corresponding to the player's statistics */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract started */,
  "contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the current contract ends */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., healthy, injured, recovering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the NBA team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager or general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team president */,
  "team_doctor" TEXT /* Name of the team doctor */,
  "team_trainer" TEXT /* Name of the team trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year corresponding to the player's statistics */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistic being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the statistic */,
  "previous_year_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic from the previous year */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in value from the previous year */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous year */,
  "improvement_trend" TEXT /* Trend of improvement (e.g., improving, declining, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progression_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progression_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES players ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year corresponding to the player's predicted statistics */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistic being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the statistic */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was last updated */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES players ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
